The problem

Missed calls are missed revenue.

Liquor retail stores field dozens of calls a day — product availability, hours, wine pairings, order holds. When staff are busy, those calls go unanswered. Every unanswered call is a customer who went somewhere else.

📵

Calls dropped during busy hours

Friday evenings, long weekends — your highest-value moments are when staff are most stretched.

⏰

After-hours go to voicemail

Customers calling at 10:45pm to ask if you're still open just hear ringing. That's a sale lost.

🤷

Staff can't answer everything

"What wine pairs with salmon?" takes a knowledgeable staff member off the floor for 5 minutes.

The solution

BottleDesk AI handles it all.

A full-stack AI receptionist trained on your store. Product expert. Sommelier. Order taker. And when it can't help — it transfers live to your team.

📞

24/7 Call Answering

Every call answered. Every time. No holds — a live AI attendant ready 24 hrs/day and 7 days/week.

🍷

Digital Sommelier

BottleDesk recommends wines by food pairing, occasion, budget, and taste profile — confidently and conversationally.

🍺

Beer & Spirits Guru

From local BC craft IPAs to aged Scotch — BottleDesk knows your inventory and gives expert recommendations instantly.

🔍

Live Inventory Check

Connected to your POS inventory, BottleDesk can check real stock counts before confirming any order or hold.

🛒

Take Orders and Book Reservations

BottleDesk can capture orders or make reservations over the phone (depending on the customization) — provide customer name, phone number, and items / reservations — then text or email staff instantly and confirm with the customer.

📊

Analytics Dashboard

See every call, every topic, every resolved vs transferred. Know exactly what your customers are asking about.

📬

Voicemail Dashboard

Manage every voicemail that is recorded so you don't miss important messages. Replay voicemail or see voicemail transcription.

📲

Build an SMS Marketing List

BottleDesk can build an SMS list (for those who opt-in) to receive live feed updates on events (sporting, tasting, gigs etc.), drink or food specials, and any other announcements — turning every call into a marketing opportunity.

Live demos

Try BottleDesk right now.

Real AI. Real conversations. Type anything.

How it works

Live in 48 hours.

STEP 01
📞

We set up your number

We provision a Twilio phone number (or port your existing one) and configure it for your store.

→
STEP 02
🧠

BottleDesk learns your store

We train BottleDesk with information about your store such as inventory, hours, specials, and more. Premium package gets a custom persona and script.

→
STEP 03
✅

You test and approve

Call your number, ask hard questions, try edge cases. We tune until you're fully satisfied.

→
STEP 04
🚀

Go live

Flip the switch. BottleDesk answers every call from that moment. You watch the dashboard and relax.

Website embed

One line. BottleDesk on your website too.

Drop a single script tag on any store website and BottleDesk appears as a live chat widget — same knowledge, same inventory, same persona. No React, no build tools, no developer needed.

🔵 Available on Growth & Premium plans
1

We send you a script tag

Configured for your store, tier, and brand colour.

2

Paste it before </body>

Works on WordPress, Squarespace, Shopify — anywhere.

3

BottleDesk appears on your site

Chat bubble in the corner, ready for customers immediately.

index.html 
<!-- Paste before </body> -->
<script
  src="https://cdn.bottledesk.ai/widget.js"
  data-store-id="mountainview"
  data-tier="growth"
  data-store-name="Mountainview Liquor"
  data-accent="#c9a84c"
  data-position="right">
</script>

<!-- That's it. BottleDesk is live. -->
